title: AutoLogin
body:
AutoLogin is a complete rewrite of the original auto-login mod, designed to provide a seamless and secure way to automatically log into your favorite Minecraft servers.

## Features

- **Freshly rewritten from scratch** for improved performance, stability, and ease of use.
- **Multiple server profiles** support with saved usernames and passwords.
- **Configurable auto-login toggles** for each server profile.
- **Simple and intuitive GUI** to manage your login configurations.
- **Secure storage** of credentials (make sure to use this responsibly).
- **Easy integration** with Minecraft 1.21 and above using NeoForge.

Whether you play on multiple servers or want to skip tedious login steps, AutoLogin automates the process so you can jump straight into the game!

---
